name: [Camunda Application] ZeebeSLORequestFailureRate
query: avg(last_1m):sum:grpc.server.handled.total{code:(DEADLINE_EXCEEDED OR UNAVAILABLE),grpc_method NOT CreateProcessInstanceWithResult} by {namespace}.as_rate() / sum:grpc.server.handled.total{grpc_method NOT CreateProcessInstanceWithResult} by {namespace}.as_rate() > 0.005
message:
gRPC error rate > 0.5% — Zeebe SLO breach. Success rate has dropped below 99.5%.

@notification-channel
